'''âv-g-f-z''' ('''kavagfezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:youthenise|youthenise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-g-f-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:youthenise|youthenise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-g-f-z
|-
! Lemma
| kavagfezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivagfezoko|thivagfezoko]] || [[word:jivagfezoko|jivagfezoko]] || [[word:shivagfezoko|shivagfezoko]] || [[word:kivagfezoko|kivagfezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
